headline: Agent orchestration and model routing dominated the quarter as iframe sandboxing broke out around MCP-served apps.
body: Technique concepts led the rotation, with tool integration, MCP, and AI-assisted development holding high ratios alongside subagents and code navigation. Meta-harnesses that route work across multiple coding agents emerged, with Omnigent orchestrating Claude Code, Codex, and Pi as interchangeable workers and OpenRouter shipping a Fusion API that routes prompts to several models and synthesizes responses through a judge, though tested results were inconsistent and sometimes slower than single strong models. The sharpest new cluster is browser security: double iframe sandboxing, srcdoc, Content Security Policy, and origin and storage isolation surfaced as the mechanism behind MCP and ChatGPT Apps embedding. Anthropic's botched Fable rollout and OpenAI price-cut talk fed a parallel thread on whether frontier models are commoditizing, pushing some users toward local inference via Ollama and OpenRouter.
